title: React Toast Notification System

statement.markdown:
## React Toast Notification System

Build a dynamic notification toast manager component overlaying the screen.

### Requirements:
1. **Toast Types**: Supports adding toasts of different kinds: `"success"`, `"error"`, `"info"`, and `"warning"` (each with appropriate Tailwind styling colors).
2. **Auto-Dismiss**: Toasts should fade and dismiss automatically after 4 seconds unless manually dismissed.
3. **Queue Animation**: Stack multiple toasts in a column in the corner of the screen with smooth slide-in and fade-out transition animations.
4. **Manual Dismiss**: Add a close button (`x`) to each toast to allow immediate dismissal.

constraints: Must style elements with Tailwind CSS

gradingCriteria.description: Verify that the interactive props, callbacks, and element structures work cleanly.
Verify state structure designs and clean Tailwind CSS layouts.
